docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER IN SUPPORT FOR ORDER ALLOWING PLTF TO PROCEED W/EVICTION GRANTED --2-- JUDGE QUIDACHAY, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP.
